## Required Checks

- [ ] Branch is rebased or updated from `main`
- [ ] `Client Build` passed
- [ ] `Server Smoke Test` passed
- [ ] All review conversations are resolved

## Testing

- [ ] `cd client && npm run ci`
- [ ] `cd server && npm run ci`

## Notes

- [ ] No secrets or production credentials were added
- [ ] Environment examples were updated if config changed
- [ ] Screenshots or API notes were added when behavior changed
